Meanwhile, Portugal are unbeaten in their three group matches against sides from CONMEBOL – Colombia will be only their third different South American opponent at the World Cup, after Brazil

title: DR Congo vs Uzbekistan - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: This will be the first ever encounter between Congo DR and Uzbekistan. Congo DR have lost four of their five games at the FIFA World Cup, with Yoane Wissa’s goal in their 1-1 draw with Portugal on MD1 their only goal scored and point earned at the tournament.

title: Panama vs England - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: Panama and England’s only previous encounter was in the group stage of the 2018 FIFA World Cup – England won 6-1, their largest World Cup victory to date. England’s only defeat against a CONCACAF nation at the FIFA World Cup came in 1950 against the USA. Since then, they have three wins and three draws.

title: Croatia vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: This will be the first ever encounter between Croatia and Ghana. Croatia are unbeaten in their four FIFA World Cup matches against African sides, scoring eight goals and conceding just one.

title: Algeria vs Austria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: Algeria and Austria’s only previous encounter was in the group stage of the 1982 FIFA World Cup – Austria won 2-0, which was their last clean sheet at the tournament. Algeria’s only FIFA World Cup victory against European opposition came in their first ever World Cup match – 2-1 over West Germany in 1982. They’ve since gone eight games without a vi

title: 2A vs 2B - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
description: This is just the second ever meeting between South Africa and Canada, with Bafana Bafana winning the other 2-0 in a 2007 friendly in Durban. Canada have lost both of their competitive meetings with African nations, losing 2-0 to Cameroon in the 2001 Confederations Cup, and 2-1 to Morocco in the 2022 FIFA World Cup.
